summary: DHH announces he's selling off his PC hardware after switching to an iMac. The post is a brief classified-ad style listing of old equipment including PCs, a large CRT monitor, a scanner, and an Amiga 1200. He notes the items are cheap but restricted to Danish buyers only due to shipping hassles.
key_points: DHH fully committed to the Mac platform, rendering all his PC hardware obsolete
The sale includes a mix of PC, Mac-peripheral, and retro computing equipment
Practical constraints (international shipping) limit the sale to local Danish buyers
money_quotes: Since the arrival of the iMac, I haven't had any use for the two PC's, my 22" CRT screen, or the OS X-incompatible PowerLook II scanner.
key_insight: An early glimpse of DHH's decisive, all-in approach: once he adopted the Mac, the old PC gear was immediately surplus to be discarded without sentimentality.
